allies.rationale_text: Pareto-principle gives scale-economies a concrete way to focus on the small share of activities that truly scale output.
Systems-thinking helps scale-economies treat throughput, measurement, and leverage as parts of one designed machine.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias can make scale-economies keep scaling a flawed design because the growth story is emotionally attractive.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Scale-economies conflicts with constraints when resource bottlenecks or operational limits prevent the expected leverage from appearing.
Scale-economies conflicts with complex-adaptive-systems when dynamic local variation resists the uniformity and predictability that scale wants.
